Daily dose limit of this reference point.

string

Session dose limit of this reference point.

Methods

AddLocation(Image, double, double, double, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Add location for reference point into image 'Image'

public bool AddLocation(Image Image, double x, double y, double z, StringBuilder errorHint)

Parameters

Image Image

Image into which location is inserted

x double

x coordinate

y double

y coordinate

z double

z coordinate

errorHint StringBuilder

Holder for error message if addition fails

Returns

bool

true if addition succeeded, false otherwise

ChangeLocation(Image, double, double, double, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Change location for reference point into image 'Image'

public bool ChangeLocation(Image Image, double x, double y, double z, StringBuilder errorHint)

Parameters

Image Image

Image into which location is inserted

x double

x coordinate in mm

y double

y coordinate in mm

z double

z coordinate in mm

errorHint StringBuilder

Holder for error message if location cannot be changed

Returns

bool

true if location was succesfully changed, false otherwise

GetReferencePointLocation(Image)

3D location of this reference point in mm

public VVector GetReferencePointLocation(Image Image)

Parameters

Image Image

Image for which the location is requested

Returns

VVector

Reference point location in 'Image', if exists, vector of NaN:s otherwise

GetReferencePointLocation(PlanSetup)

The location of the reference point in mm.

public VVector GetReferencePointLocation(PlanSetup planSetup)

Parameters

planSetup PlanSetup

Plan setup that this reference point is connected to.

Returns

VVector

Reference point location, if set for image, NaN:s otherwise

HasLocation(PlanSetup)

Tests if a valid reference point location exists.

public bool HasLocation(PlanSetup planSetup)

Parameters

planSetup PlanSetup

Plan setup that this reference point is connected to

Returns

bool

True if the reference point has location; false, otherwise

RemoveLocation(Image, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Remove reference point location from image 'Image'

public bool RemoveLocation(Image Image, StringBuilder errorHint)

Parameters

Image Image

Image from which the location for the reference point is removed

errorHint StringBuilder

Holder for error message if removal fails

Returns

bool

true if location was removed or there was no location to remove, false if existing location could not be removed

Converts an object into its XML representation. For more information on how to serialize an object into an XML document, see System.Xml.Serialization.XmlSerializer.

writer XmlWriter
